taskDescription: Complete the crossword on Cancer Biology, HIV, and Alcohol Metabolism (BI13.1-5).

words.clue: Tumour suppressor gene mutated in over 50% of human cancers
Programmed cell death that eliminates damaged cells
HIV enzyme that converts viral RNA into DNA
Toxic intermediate of ethanol metabolism formed by alcohol dehydrogenase
Oncogene mutated in 30% of all cancers, acts as a molecular switch
Tumour marker elevated in ovarian cancer
Process by which normal cells transform into cancer cells
Breast cancer oncogene that is a target for trastuzumab therapy
